headline: NOV and Transocean Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after crude oil dropped to its lowest level since the start of the Iran war, as tankers resumed transit through the Strait of Hormuz and the U.S. and Iran signaled progress toward ending the conflict.

headline: Phillips 66 to announce second-quarter financial results
summary: HOUSTON, June 24, 2026--Phillips 66 executive management will host a webcast at noon ET on Wednesday, Aug. 5, 2026, to discuss second-quarter 2026 financial results.

raw.headline: Phillips 66 to announce second-quarter financial results
raw.summary: HOUSTON, June 24, 2026--Phillips 66 executive management will host a webcast at noon ET on Wednesday, Aug. 5, 2026, to discuss second-quarter 2026 financial results.

headline: Phillips 66 (PSX) Partners With Kanin Energy On 7 Megawatt Power Project
summary: Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) is partnering with Kanin Energy on a 7-megawatt waste heat to power project at its Mewbourn natural gas processing complex. The project will use waste heat from existing operations to generate electricity, targeting lower greenhouse gas emissions and improved energy efficiency. Kanin Energy is providing a turnkey solution that does not require upfront capital expenditure from Phillips 66. Phillips 66 operates across refining, midstream, chemicals, and marketing. The...

headline: Petrobras and Pemex Sign MOU to Boost Gulf of Mexico Output
summary: PBR teams up with Pemex to evaluate Gulf of Mexico projects, mature field recovery and refining initiatives under a new cooperation pact.
